records.title: Cart total remains visible
records.intent: Users can always see the current cart total after adding an item.
records.given: a cart with one existing item
records.then: the displayed cart total reflects both items

records.title: Discounts do not hide totals
records.intent: A discount message must not replace the cart total.
records.given: a cart with an active discount
records.then: the discount and cart total are both visible

records.title: Item names remain visible
records.intent: Adding long-horizon cart details must not hide item names, totals, or discounts.
records.given: a cart with named items and an active discount
records.when: the cart is rendered after later checkpoint changes
records.then: item names, the cart total, and discount information are all visible together
